# AI Tools Pricing Hub

> Compare pricing and features of 100+ AI tools across 20 languages. Find the best deals, alternatives, and money-saving tips for popular AI services like ChatGPT Plus, Claude Pro, Midjourney, GitHub Copilot, and more.

## Site Overview
- Total AI tools tracked: 100+
- Supported languages: 20
- Page types: tools, compare, guides, ranking, faq, history, alternatives
- Base URL: https://pricing.ai-term-hub.com/

## Important Pages
- [Home](https://pricing.ai-term-hub.com/)
- [All Tools](https://pricing.ai-term-hub.com/en/tools/)
- [All Categories](https://pricing.ai-term-hub.com/en/ranking/)
- [All Guides](https://pricing.ai-term-hub.com/en/guides/)
- [All FAQs](https://pricing.ai-term-hub.com/en/faq/)
- [Sitemap](https://pricing.ai-term-hub.com/sitemap.xml)
